title: 60-Second Morning Mobility Flow
description: A daily-mobility flow short enough to fit before coffee but specific enough to address the joints women in their 40s feel first thing in the morning. Hook leads with the surprise — your body shouldn't feel 80 when you're 40.
hook: Your body shouldn't feel 80 when you're 40.
keyMessage: A 60-second flow can transform your mornings
angle: Demystify mobility — make it tiny enough to actually do
